name: United Club℠ Business Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus miles + 2,000 PQP after $5,000 in 3 months + 10,000 miles after adding employee card in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 6X miles as MileagePlus member + 2X miles with United Club Business Card. Excludes Basic Economy.
2X miles on all other eligible United purchases
5X miles on hotel stays prepaid directly through Renowned Hotels and Resorts for United Cardmembers

annual_credits.name: Renowned Hotels Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 credit on prepaid hotel stays through Renowned Hotels and Resorts for United Cardmembers

annual_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $150 credit on rideshare purchases (enrollment required)

annual_credits.name: Avis/Budget Car Rental Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 credit on Avis or Budget rentals booked via cars.united.com

annual_credits.name: Instacart Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $240 in Instacart credits each calendar year

annual_credits.name: JSX Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 credit on flights purchased directly through JSX

annual_credits.name: FareLock Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $50 credit on FareLock purchases on United flights

annual_credits.name: Better Together Bonus
annual_credits.description: 5,000-mile bonus each year when you also hold a personal United credit card

lounge_access.name: United Club
lounge_access.notes: Primary cardmember and eligible companions get access to all United Club locations worldwide.~$750 value.

other_benefits.name: Premier Access
other_benefits.description: Priority check-in, security screening, boarding, and baggage handling where available

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bags
other_benefits.description: First and second checked bags free for primary cardmember and one companion on United (save up to $360 roundtrip)

other_benefits.name: Economy Plus Upgrades
other_benefits.description: 2 global Economy Plus seat upgrades after spending $40,000 each calendar year

other_benefits.name: PQP Earning
other_benefits.description: 1 PQP per $15 spent on card purchases, up to 28,000 PQP per year — can help earn Premier status

other_benefits.name: Award Flight Discount
other_benefits.description: Save at least 10% when booking United flights with miles. Premier members earn even more.

notes: AF increased from $450 to $695 in March 2025. One of the most expensive business cards but offers $925+ in annual partner credits + United Club lounge access (~$750 value) + PQP earning for Premier status. Total annual value exceeds $2,000 per Chase's own estimate.
